ExtraProperties.Name: ApplicantCertifyCheckbox
ExtraProperties.Label: I certify that I have read, understand, and agree to the Authorization and Waiver information above, and all given statements are true and correct to the best of my knowledge.

ExtraProperties.Name: AuthorizationandWaiver
ExtraProperties.Label: Authorization and Waiver
ExtraProperties.Text:
Southern California Edison Company (SCE) may modify or discontinue the Energy Savings Assistance (ESA) Building Electrification Pilot (the “Program”) at any time in its sole discretion, without prior notice, or by order of the California Public Utilities Commission (CPUC). The Program is funded by California utility customers and administered by SCE under the auspices of the CPUC and is subject to the availability of funds.

  1. As the Applicant:
    1. I certify that I meet the Program eligibility requirements and that the information regarding household members and income I have provided in this Application is true and correct. Upon request, I agree to provide updated documentation of eligibility.
    2. I authorize SCE and its authorized contractor or any subcontractors of the contractor (“Contractor”), to obtain information regarding my utility bill and usage, and other information pertinent to my participation in the Program.
    3. I understand that a bill analysis will be performed to estimate potential bill impacts based on eligible measures, improvements, and services installed on the Property pursuant to the Program (Measures). If the analysis estimates the Measures will cause a negative bill impact, I understand that I may not be able to participate in the Program.
    4. I hereby waive any claim to Local, State or Federal tax credits, utility cash rebates, or any other utility incentives with respect to any Measures.
  2. I understand that if I qualify and am approved for participation in the Program:
    1. I grant permission to SCE and the Contractor to access the property to perform a home assessment, install feasible Measures, including electrical upgrades (the “Work”) as determined necessary by the Contractor.
    2. Measures approved for installation, at a minimum, must include heat pump space and water heating equipment. All Measures pursuant to the Program are provided and installed at no cost.\
    3. I may cancel at any time prior to the installation of Measures without penalty or obligation.
    4. I grant permission to SCE, Contractor, SCE-authorized inspection contractor(s), city, county, state or municipal building inspectors and any other authorized Program representative to access the property to inspect any of the Work. I understand that failure to comply with the inspection process may create a safety concern and may void the manufacturer’s warranty. If a building permit is required for the Work, I agree to allow all required inspections to occur. If I do not grant reasonable access or refuse to allow such inspection to be completed, I understand that I will be responsible for all costs, penalties, and fees that the permitting jurisdiction may levy upon the property.
  3. For Renter/Tenants:
    1. I understand and agree that a 1) Property Owner Authorization form and 2) Tenant Protection Agreement will be required prior to any Work being performed. The Contractor will seek to obtain signatures on these forms directly from the legal owner of the property or the legal owner’s authorized representative.
    2. If I did not own the original appliance that is replaced by a new Measure pursuant to the Program, I agree not to remove at any time the newly installed Measure(s) from the property.
  4. To make this Program cost-effective and offer it to as many qualified customers as possible, the Contractor purchases high-quality, Energy Star® qualified products (where applicable). As a result, the Program offers a limited number of energy-efficient models and may not be equipped with the same features as the existing units. At the time of installation, the Contractor will provide written warranty information and instructions specific to each Measure installed.
  5. I acknowledge and agree that SCE has not authorized any services, improvements, installations, or equipment other than the Measures (which may include electrical upgrades), and I understand that SCE assumes no liability for such services, improvements, installations, or equipment. I acknowledge and agree that SCE makes no representations or covenants as to the safety, reliability and/or efficiency of the Measures.
  6. I understand that SCE is not responsible for and will not perform any combustion appliance safety testing on natural gas or propane appliances not replaced with electric appliance through the Program, nor will the Contractor perform any work on natural gas or propane appliances that remain in the property.
  7. I acknowledge and agree that SCE shall not be liable for any damages or losses arising out of any act or omission of Contractor in performing the Work, and I hereby release SCE from and against, and waive as against SCE, any and all claims that may arise in connection with the Work.
  8. I agree to hold the Contractor solely responsible for the performance of the Work and for any and all claims, losses, liabilities, damages, and expenses (including attorneys’ fees and costs) that may arise as a result of the Work.
  9. Furthermore, I shall defend, indemnify, and hold harmless SCE and its respective officers and employees against any and all action, liability, damages, demands or costs, for injury to or death or any and all persons whatsoever, and for any and all damage to property, in any manner arising from, or in connection with, the performance of the Work hereunder, except for the damages caused solely by the gross negligence or willful misconduct of SCE.
  10. I acknowledge and agree that the material and information provided as part of energy education are for informational purposes only. SCE makes no warranty, whether express or implied, including without limitation to the warranty of merchantability or fitness for any particular purpose, use, or application of the material and information provided as part energy education and Measures.
  11. I understand SCE selected independent research firms, ILLUME and Verdant (“Evaluator”), to conduct research related to the Program and I acknowledge the Evaluator may contact me by mail, email, or telephone to obtain additional information regarding the performance of the Work completed and experience with the Program.
  12. I understand that all information collected in this Application, the home assessment, installation, and inspection is considered confidential information. However, I acknowledge that SCE may share my information with the Evaluator, and if requested, with the CPUC. I also understand that this information may be shared with and used by administrators and contractors for other energy-related programs that may benefit me, including but not limited to California Alternative Rates for Energy (CARE), Family Electric Rate Assistance (FERA), Low-Income Weatherization Program (LIWP), Disadvantaged Community Single-family Affordable Solar Homes (SASH) Program, Self-Generation Incentive Program (SGIP), and Technology and Equipment for Clean Heating (TECH) Clean California Program.
  13. I acknowledge and agree that my e-mail address may be used to receive information related to my participation in the Program and other energy-related or demand response programs. I understand that I may choose to opt-out at any time by replying to the email received.
  14. I understand that if I have any questions regarding this Application, the home assessment, Measures, or any other item regarding the Program, I should contact MAROMA Energy Services at the telephone number and/or email listed below. Office hours are between 8:00 A.M. and 5:00 P.M. PST, Monday through Friday.

ExtraProperties.Name: CAREFERAConsent
ExtraProperties.Text: By completing this application, I give my consent to SCE to share the information contained in this document with SCE’s Discount Rate Programs. I understand that if I am not already on the California Alternate Rate for Energy (CARE) or Family Electric Rate Assistance (FERA) rate, I may be automatically enrolled. I affirm the accuracy of the information provided, agree to provide proof of income or eligibility upon request, and authorize SCE to share my information with other utilities, SCE contractors, state and federal agencies, and entities designated by the CPUC about other residential assistance programs. Additionally, I consent to receiving promotional messages via phone, text, and email regarding voluntary participation in other programs and services, and I can later opt out of these messages. My participation in CARE or FERA is subject to the terms and conditions at sce.com/carefera
